review_title: WebDrive Makes Cloud Storage Easily Accessible
author: Jyll S.
pros: With more of my clients wanting to store data in Amazon S3 and other S3-compatible stores, I needed a way to access the data without using the Console. I had TNTDrive installed, but I needed to upgrade and it does not work on a Mac. So, I tried many products and settled on WebDrive primarily for cost as well as ease of deployment on PCs and Mac.
cons: The only challenge for me is that there are different connection paradigms on PC versus Mac. Adding a network drive versus mounting a volume. That's not really a complaint per se, rather a personal challenge of moving between platforms multiple times during the day.

review_title: Best, most feature-rich cloud-drive tool I've come across
description: Makes working with cloud and local files a lot easier. I's all withing a few clicks way. Want to copy some files drom OneDrive to Google Drive? Just cop and pste from Windows Explorer and you're done. It's pretty great.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I found out about WebDrive because I searched for a product that supported a wide rage of cloud storage services. I'm using it to mount my Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, STACK (WebDAV) and internal FTP server. Setting it up is easy and works fine. When you want to go deeper, there's a lot of options to tweak and improve performance. Overall, I'm very pleased with WebDrive.
cons: The plethora of advanced options are a little overwhelming, and the manual isn't too clear on all of them. Lucily, Support helped me out with the few questions I had. The advanced options are a must if you want to improve performance, because Windows isn't too.. keen on a Google Drive drive, for instance. You'll want to do something with caching and other tweaks.

review_title: Licenses only last a certain amount of time
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Worked fine until I had to reinstall it and it states my license expired.
cons: You pay the full price for a license and if you have to reinstall or upgrade after a year it expires so you have to buy it all over again. They used to have a flat price for the software, but now they force you to pay for maintenance support which adds an additional 50% to the cost. They care more about the profits than the customers now.

review_title: Product assistance
description: [SENSITIVE CONTENT] at WebDrive was very prompt in responding to my issue & very helpful in helping me to isolate the point of failure. We have used this product for some time in our small business & it just plain works for us. Very intuitive interface.
author: George K.
pros: The UI on the software is very intuitive and easy to use. The product works, assuming what you are mapping to works.
cons: When attempting to map a Synology NAS folder as a drive, we experienced a failure. Failure message was not sufficient to isolate the point of failure. Not sure if any improvement in failure message could be made. Point of failure was with Synology product.

review_title: Great Support
description: Having used Webdrive for many years already, yesterday I had a support question. Support response was not only lightning fast, it was accurate & resolved my issue in a matter of minutes !
author: Raf V.
pros: It's easy to use & handles lots of different file sources.
cons: On some server types it's a bit slow, like FTP with implicit TLS.

review_title: great support
description: brilliant. I just sent a support request and expected to wait a day. I had a full technical response in under 5 mins! amazing
author: Steve P.
pros: it just works, never fails. half the time I forget it's there. just how good system software should be
cons: It is a tad too expensive for those of us who are smaller businesses. But it works well so I guess I can't complain ;-)

review_title: Fast and reliable service
description: Ease of use is available. Providing a reliable service is one of the most important factors that makes this product useful. Because I am transferring data with peace of mind. I've had positive experiences.
author: Jinal P.
pros: I like that file transfer is easy and fast. It makes working with cloud and local files much easier. In addition, the fact that it offers a reliable service was one of the biggest factors in choosing this software. Security is always an issue when connecting, transmitting and accessing data on our servers, so it is a great choice for a reliable connection since we do not encounter such a problem in WebDrive. By mapping it to our WebDAV servers, it offers the convenience of being instantly connected at startup. Our credentials are encrypted and stored, making our connection effortless and secure.
cons: The only thing I can criticize is the cost. I found the cost a little high.

review_title: Mount point for large FTP server
description: Thus far I'd FTP calls in the big data analysis code. But this made that so much easier with a local mount point and even gained [small amount] in turn-around time, it's almost like having the entire remote data repository locally!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The fact that this allows for easy creation of a local mount point for massive remote storage devices. Webdrive is quite easy to get started with. The windows internal FTP handling is quite bad. This app makes the windows experience far better with network storage devices. Compared to other similar apps, this is also probably the most reasonably priced. In the few days I've been using this app, never had a crash or a disconnected drive pop-up. The app is also fairly modular and works independently of other clients which may cross-talk and use FTP calls to the same device connected to with Web-Drive.
cons: I use Web-Drive on Win-10. It was hard to find the mount point location on the Windows bash kernel.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great software but one license per computer.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easily access all of your online data without syncing everything to your computer. Automatically syncs files you use while you are online so you can use them when offline - great for a laptop.
cons: Expensive. One license per computer even if same user. This negates the main benefit of having your data online unless you purchase multiple expensive licenses.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: WebDrive for SharePoint migrations
description: We are using this tool to help us with client migrations of local file shares to Sharepoint Online through Office 365. It is easy to setup and install giving options to select the SharePoint document endpoint for migrations. There are additional options for optimizing the connection for best performance. This has worked very well for migrations of file shares of up to 1TB of data.
author: Brian G.
pros: Allows for painless connection to SharePoint Online Document Centers and Libraries. We have utilized this tool as part of our migration strategy for our customers when migrating file shares.
cons: Configuration of options to allow best performance for migration.

review_title: Tested and approved
description: With WebDrive all the operators who works at the customers can connect live on the synology NAS of the company
author: DUVALLET J.
pros: The speed of installation and the simplicity of installation
cons: you need nne licence by pc ans not by NAS
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Very easy to use, and excellent customer service!
description: I run two companies, which are similar in nature but are located in two different offices. I need seamless access to my NAS drives at both locations. Webdrive took care of that!
author: Adrian S.
pros: Very easy to set up, and works just as expected. Clean and functional interface, that make sense.
cons: To be honest it really just works in the background as intended. After an upgrade, I once had an issue, but the customer gave me the solution within 20 minutes!!! No real complaints, except I think it's a bit pricey. But hey, it works.

review_title: Great support
author: Dirk S.
pros: WebDrive helps integrating nearly every storage solution into business processes. By serving a drive letter for online storage providers it connects legacy software solutions to the cloud. Setup and configuration is quite easy - you have a running solution within minutes. WebDrive can be rolled out in huge organizations with pre-defined connection settings very easily. What I like most is the perfect support that SRT delivers. Applause, applause...
cons: There is nothing that I could point out here...

review_title: Very good for SFTP connection!!
description: I molecular simulations. These are computationally expensive simulations and hence can only be done on university high performance computing servers. I frequently have to do data analysis with the data obtained from these simulations and hence WebDrive becomes immensely useful here when working remotely.
author: Vikramjit R.
pros: I have extensively used this software in my grad school. My research involves computer simulations and hence I am able to use SFTP connection to my university account where I run simulations and store data. Using WebDrive has been a blessing as I can update my simulations and extract data for analysis remotely and this has been specially useful during visit to another cities for conferences. The syncing of the new data is also excellent with WebDrive. I highly recommend this product.
cons: Nothing really. I have used this product without any issues.

review_title: Great product for mapping to Sharepoint site
description: Accessing files via Sharepoint website or Teams did not work well at all with non-Microsoft files; IE: Adobe products. Even MS products had issues at time. Users are use to File Explorer and drive letters; so kept it simple for the end user.
author: David C.
pros: Easy to install and setup. Once it is setup you do not have to worry about it.
cons: Only one and there maybe an option for this & have not found it. Have to login for each drive mapping.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Incredible software product, incredible customer service
description: This software has made a project of mine incredibly easy to accomplish and has allowed me to expand my options. Bravo webdrive!!!
author: jay S.
pros: Easy to use. Extremely powerful. Fills a niche very effectively. Cost is totally reasonable for the value of this software. Customer service was responsive and knowledgeable.
cons: I find this product to have no obvious cons.

review_title: Great Remote File Sharing Product
author: Kem S.
pros: It works really well and allows the sharing of information for remote staff
cons: The cache management could be improved and causes out of sync file handling issues.

review_title: Straightforward way to utilize cloud storage
description: Overall solves my problem of have a reliable means of storing data in the cloud my way.
author: Ed B.
pros: This software enables me to use cloud storage in, to me, an intuitive way, by regarding it as another drive. After struggling with consumer software which was trying to manage back up and synch for me and causing a series of confusing problems, I decide the easiest method was to utilize WebDrive, use its backup capability, or other copy software where needed to meet my needs. This way I can reliably know what is being done.
cons: It took a bit to grasp some of the configuration terms and ideas, but once I had sufficient (not complete) understanding I set it, and never looked back.

review_title: Amazing tools for mapping drives.
author: Mohammad A.
pros: WebDrive is the most stable mapping drive software, full of features, and wide compatible.
cons: WebDrive sometimes looks complex because it's rich in features.

review_title: Customer support was great they went out of there way to help with a specific problem
description: Ability to get a good product that still works with Win Xp.
author: Kim R.
pros: The software is easy to set up and use. I was able to get a version of software that would still run on on win Xp with no issues. For people running industrial equipment this is a huge benefit.
cons: Transferring very large files can sometime cause the system to stop or hang up during a long down load or upload.

review_title: A good tool with exceptional support seals the deal for me
description: I can't say enough about the customer support I received here. After some issues with large file size downloads, the support team was extremely hands on and spent many hours working with me to resolve the issue. Many companies could use to learn from these guys.
author: Aaron M.
pros: The software is easy to use and set up. But, most importantly, the support team is exceptional.
cons: I had some issues with large downloads, but the support team was exceptionally responsive and hands on to resolve them.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Finally, my Cloud Data is Exposed
description: I use my computer for hours almost every day. Somewhere along the way I started saving my work and other interests to the Cloud. Since most of this was not my 'main data' , I would sometimes forget where I stored stuff. My Cloud always required a separate step for me and sometimes I would forget how to get there. WebDrive has been the perfect solution because it makes my Cloud data as easily accessible as any of my other data devices. Now my Cloud data has a drive designator as "W" and I can get to it as easily as my drive "C". My computer boots with this assignment and the process is now a "no brainer".
author: Tom W.
pros: Easy to install and implement. Makes my Google Drive more accessible.
cons: No Cons at this point. After Trial I hope to experiment with more options.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Customer Support that deserves great business
description: Being able to connect up to Office 365 / Sharepoint without having to reconnect after a shutdown/reboot.
author: Billy M.
pros: Software works great and the support is outstanding. There was an issue I had while testing the trial version that didn't quite fit what my client's needs were. I contacted support and we were able to fix the issue promptly and I was sent a new version of the program with the fix implemented. Worked perfectly after that.
cons: The only issue I had with this program ended up becoming a Pro. A feature of the Sharepoint Online wasn't quite working right but support was amazing and able to get it fixed and working as needed.
author_industry: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Professional Alternative to the freebies
author: Mark H.
pros: WebDrive is a professional alternative to the freeware apps that do the same. The support is very responsive and sorted a minor issue in no time.
cons: Not sure there are any to be fair. Hard to find it in the first place.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Works as expected
description: Use it every day. Makes access to server data easy and fast.
author: Ernst H.
pros: Install and use in minutes. Quickly displays the files on the servers and shows hardly any transmission errors.
cons: The extra price for maintenance/support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
